title: FCC took pricey gifts from Paramount as the company needed approval for deals
summary: However, past disclosures show Carr and Trusty are among seven FCC commissioners who have accepted Kennedy gala tickets from CBS or its parent company over the last decade. Neither Carr nor Trusty responded to ProPublica’s requests for comment.
caption: output/2026-07-17/fcc-took-pricey-gifts-from-paramount-as-the-company-needed-approval-fo.txt
